summary: Tested new POS features: Login branding, Advanced Analytics, Loyalty/Marketing, WooCommerce publish. Backend: 18/19 passed (1 skipped). Frontend: Fixed critical AdvancedAnalyticsPage crash and all pages working. Fixed minor branding field name issue.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Page was crashing with 'restockSuggestions.map is not a function' due to API response structure mismatch
integration_issues.resolution: Fixed fetchAnalytics() to properly extract nested data from API responses (data.suggestions, data.employees, etc.)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/branding/settings - Public endpoint returns branding data
Backend: GET /api/analytics/top-products - Returns top selling products
Backend: GET /api/analytics/sales-prediction - Returns predictions with trend
Backend: GET /api/loyalty/settings - Returns loyalty program config
Backend: GET /api/customers - Returns customer list with loyalty points
Frontend: Login page loads with branding customization
Frontend: /analytics page loads with charts and predictions
Frontend: /loyalty page loads with 3 tabs (Settings, Customers, Campaigns)
Frontend: Product detail page shows WooCommerce publish button
Frontend: Sidebar navigation has links to /analytics and /loyalty under Administration section
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AdvancedAnalyticsPage.js was not handling nested API response structures correctly - needed to extract arrays from objects like {data: [...]} or {suggestions: [...]}
FIXED: LoginPage.js uses background_url but API returns background_image_url - added fallback to handle both field names
NOTE: WooCommerce and SMS APIs are MOCKED - return simulated data as documented
NOTE: Analytics charts show empty state (no sales data in test database) but render correctly

success_rate.backend: 95% (18/19 passed, 1 skipped due to no products)

seed_data_creation: TEST_WooCommerce_Product created and deleted during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) Branding API public at /api/branding/settings 2) Analytics page at /analytics with sales charts 3) Loyalty page at /loyalty with settings/customers/campaigns 4) WooCommerce publish button on product detail pages. WooCommerce and SMS are MOCKED.

Login Page Branding /api/branding/settin.details: Public API returns business_name, logo_url, background_image_url

Advanced Analytics /analytics.details: Shows sales charts, predictions, top products/customers, employee performance

Loyalty & Marketing /loyalty.details: 3 tabs - Settings (points config), Customers (points display), Campaigns (SMS MOCKED)

WooCommerce Publish Button.details: Button visible on product detail page, API responds correctly (MOCKED)
